name: Maintenance Mode
description: Show a 'Coming Soon' or maintenance page to visitors. Logged-in admins can still browse the site.
author: Core 3 CMS

settings.label: Message
settings.default: We're working on some improvements. We'll be back shortly.
settings.hint: The message shown below the title.

settings.label: Allow logged-in admins to view the site
settings.hint: Admins can bypass maintenance mode when logged in.
